title: Kaisi Yeh Yaariaan
subTitle: Manik inquires Kabir; to know who is he dating. Dhruv tells Manik that he's trying to be friends again with Nandini. This makes Manik feel jealous. Everyone come together and celebrate Raghav's birthday.

title: Night Out
subTitle: A compilation of the greatest foot-tapping hits to sing along to are played back to back in order to entertain the audience.

title: Roadies Real Heroes
subTitle: Raftaar gains the power to choose his gang members upon winning the task. Later, a fight erupts between Chetna and Arushi.

title: Roadies
subTitle: As the audition round concludes, gang leaders vie for their final team members. However, tensions arise when Prince loses his temper.

subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of some of the melodious and soulful songs, composed by various talented artists, is played back-to-back.

subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of energetic and popular songs performed by various renowned artists and musicians, played back to back.
